LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUL-15-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL AND ENTER JUDGMENT UNDER TERMS OF STIPULATED SETTLEMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL AND ENTER JUDGMENT UNDER TERMS OF STIPULATED SETTLEMENT" IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Dismissal And Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Settlement
Off Calendar Jul-15-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's Motion To Vacate Dismissal And Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Settlement.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to vacate dismissal and enter judgment under terms of stipulated settlement" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-03-2022 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-11-27 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
